channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-19T11:58Z — 1373 outages, 55,741 customers, 854 fair-weather, 13 DC-proximate
item.description: PA-PPL: 2493 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | VA-DOM: 1692 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | BGE: 1501 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | OH-AEP: 1500 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER) | NJ-ACE: 1147 cust (UNEXPLAINED FAIR-WEATHER)
